name: PeakMacro
description: A professional macro recorder and player for Geometry Dash. Record, save, load, and replay your inputs with frame-perfect precision.

show-overlay.name: Show Overlay
show-overlay.description: Show the PeakMacro overlay while playing

auto-save-macro.name: Auto Save Macro
auto-save-macro.description: Automatically save macro after recording stops

fps-bypass.name: FPS Bypass for Playback
fps-bypass.description: Enable FPS bypass during macro playback for accuracy
